calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-19-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Department 206 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Blair Adams on October 13, 2020, and continued to today, October 19, 2020.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gerardo C Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Reporter: Ann Mendoza, CSR #6812. Telephone: 415-551-0625. Email: amendoza@sftc.org.

Keri Salet, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Bank of America, N.A.
George Garcia, Custodian Records for Bank of America, N.A., was placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Garcia appeared via CourtCall for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Blair P. Adams.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Open Book/Common Counts was filed on February 5, 2019.
Defendant Blair P. Adams' answer to plaintiff's complaint was filed on April 26, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trail was served on June 21, 2019.
Order granting defendant's request to continue the Trial Date to May 4, 2020 was filed with the Clerk's Office on January 23, 2020.
On May 4, 2020, Department 206 continued the Trial Date to October 13, 2020, on which date the matter was assigned to Department 514 for Short Cause Trial/Prove-Up Hearing on Monday, October 19, 2020.
No DOE defendants were named in plaintiff's complaint.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Bank of America, N.A., and against defendant Blair P. Adams, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $27,759.22 (Amount pled in complaint).
Prejudgment Interest - WAIVED.
Attorney Fees - WAIVED.
Costs - $509.50.

Total - $27,268.72.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
